mapper.select:
SELECT course_id AS courseId, progress FROM user_course_relation WHERE course_id IN
#{courseId}

SELECT c.id, c.title, cat.name AS category, -- 课程标签，逗号分隔 tag.tags, c.description, c.cover_url as cover, -- 学习人数 IFNULL(learn.learners, 0) AS learners, c.difficulty,
-- 当前用户是否已选课 EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_course_relation ucr2 WHERE ucr2.course_id = c.id AND ucr2.user_id = #{userId} ) AS enrolled,
-- 当前用户学习进度 ( SELECT ucr3.progress FROM user_course_relation ucr3 WHERE ucr3.course_id = c.id AND ucr3.user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1 ) AS progress,
c.update_time AS lastTime
FROM course c
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cc.course_id, categ.id AS category_id, categ.name FROM course_category_relation cc JOIN category categ ON cc.category_id = categ.id )cat ON c.id = cat.course_id
-- 学习人数子查询 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT course_id, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS learners FROM user_course_relation GROUP BY course_id ) learn ON learn.course_id = c.id
-- 标签子查询 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ct.course_id, GROUP_CONCAT(t.name) AS tags FROM course_tag ct JOIN tag t ON ct.tag_id = t.id GROUP BY ct.course_id ) tag ON tag.course_id = c.id
AND c.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dto.keyword}, '%')
AND cat.category_id = #{dto.categoryId}
AND c.difficulty = #{dto.difficulty}
